title: rothmannia annae
intro: Rothmannia annae, also known as the 'Lady's Hat' or 'Lady's Mug', is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is traditionally used in West African folk medicine, where its medicinal properties are attributed to its high content of alkaloids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Rothmannia annae include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune system function. Rothmannia annae is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it can also be used to make a decoction, which is then used to treat various ailments.
